startPoint.en: Talk to Lex in the Hair of the Dog tavern, south of the Canifis lodestone.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lex en la taberna Hair of the Dog, al sur de la piedra de viaje de Canifis.

recommended.name: Portable fairy ring
recommended.display: Portable fairy ring or grace of the elves

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal or master archaeologist's outfit (for quick access to the Iceyene graveyard)

recommended.name: Dive
recommended.display: Dive (or dual wielded melee weapons for Bladed Dive) available to jump a moderate distance

recommended.name: Mobile
recommended.display: A piece of augmented armour with the Mobile perk to halve the cooldown of Surge and Dive (which can be nicely paired with a powerburst of acceleration)

recommended.name: Double Surge codex
recommended.display: Unlocking the ability to surge twice by reading a Double Surge codex

text.en: Talk to Lex on the west side of the Hair of the Dog tavern, south of the Canifis lodestone.
text.es: Habla con Lex en el lado oeste de la taberna Hair of the Dog, al sur de la piedra de viaje de Canifis.

rows: Mr Bitey
Ummm, I think I might have lost a plushie in a prison cell.
On the 3rd floor of Paterdomus, in a bed behind the bars.
Count Snugula
Umm, I might have dropped one in a hidden library somewhere.
Under the Paterdomus, climb down the trapdoor near Drezel or Ivan Strom. The plushie is on the top shelf of a book shelf.
Fangs
Umm, I'm sure I lost one deep in the Haunted Woods.
South-west of the fairy ring (code ALQ) in the Haunted Woods, being held by a skeleton.
Draccles
Umm, there was a tomb nearby when I lost the next one.

On a rock near Ivandis Seergaze's tomb in the Meiyerditch Laboratories. Fairy ring (code DLS), then through three cave entrances: south, north, then north-east. Furthest cave entrance north, just south of searchable wall.
Mr Puddles
Ooh yuck - that place with the spiders. I ran away fast!
Inside the Araxyte Hive, near the entrance to the fight with Araxxor.
Drakemon
Umm, the next one I lost was near a tree with a big hole in it.
In The Hollows, in a group of mushrooms just south of the entrance to the caves, east of the large tree near Curpile Fyod. Nearest teleport is Canifis lodestone.
Blushie
Umm, I think I lost one in a secret hideout.
On a chair in the Myreque Hideout in Burgh de Rott. Climb down the trapdoor at the The Dilapidated pub. Teleport to Burgh de Rott using Drakan's medallion.
Vamplushie
Umm, I remember being in a mine one time.

In a broken minecart in the south-west corner of the Meiyerditch mine. Teleport to Darkmeyer using Drakan's Medallion then enter Castle Drakan's refinery and push the minecart in the south-eastern tunnel to travel to the mine.
Heartless
Umm, I lost one in an underground laboratory somewhere.
In a broken range in the normal bloodveld chamber in the Meiyerditch laboratory. Teleport to Meiyerditch laboratory using Drakan's Medallion or blood altar teleport.
My Little Vanstrom
Umm, there was loads of blood near where I lost the last one!
In a coffin, just west of the blood altar. Nearest teleport is the blood altar teleport.
Vlad the Embracer
Umm, there was a carpeted cave I remember - I might have lost one there.

Sitting on the edge of the blood pool in Drakan's tomb under Burgh de Rott. Partial completion of The Branches of Darkmeyer required. Teleport to Burgh de Rott using Drakan's medallion, and enter the cave entrance.
Booboo
Umm, I lost one in a graveyard, I think.

In a swamp tree just west of the mausoleum in the Icyene graveyard. If the The Lord of Vampyrium quest has been started, teleport to Burgh de Rott using Drakan's medallion and board the boat on the south shore. If not, go to the Everlight Dig Site and use the south shortcut to hop down to the graveyard.
Scare Bear
Umm, the next one I lost on a wall somewhere.

At the very end of the top of the wall around Darkmeyer, north of Drakan's castle, just east of the north sketch location for The Darkness of Hallowvale. Take the boat from Burgh de Rott to Meiyerditch and travel north along the wall to reach the wall around Darkmeyer.

text.en: Teleport back to Canifis and talk to Lex.
text.es: Teletranspórtate de vuelta a Canifis y habla con Lex.
